docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NICKY CHHINA--LEGAL SPECIALIST. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,042.00 FILED BY CHANG, YOSUN AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORP.) SERVED AUG-27-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, YOSUN AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-18-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, YOSUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, YOSUN
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
